reasoning: Your current limiter is lactate clearance. After a 7-day rest, we'll gently reintegrate intensity. This workout combines over-unders with extended sweet spot efforts to improve your aerobic base and fatigue resistance—critical for the Alpine Loop's sustained climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x 10-min blocks: 2 min at 201-218W followed by 3 min at 242-256W, repeat 2x per block

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
